description: Join a community or submit a join request. Requires an approved user account. Optional `kind`, `tags`, and `attributes` classify the membership semantically (see issue #50).

main.description: Join a community directly (open policy) or submit a join request (approval policy).

did.description: The DID of the community to join.

kind.description: Optional: semantic type of membership (e.g. 'player', 'staff', 'fan'). Free-form; consuming apps own the vocabulary.

tags.description: Optional: additive flags that coexist with `kind` (e.g. 'captain', 'founder').

attributes.description: Optional: opaque JSON object of kind-specific metadata. Stored verbatim.

status.description: Result status: 'joined' if immediately joined, 'pending' if join request submitted.

errors.name: AlreadyMember
errors.description: User is already a member of this community.

errors.name: AlreadyRequested
errors.description: User has already submitted a pending join request.
